arts.ttl: Watch Millwall vs. City on Cardiff City TV in selected territories!
arts.sum: Bluebirds in selected territories can watch Tuesday's fixture live on Cardiff City TV. The match will be available to watch via Cardiff City TV in all territories EXCEPT the following:

arts.ttl: Six years after Emiliano Sala’s death, Cardiff chairman calls for shakeup in transfer rules
arts.sum: Mehmet Dalman says hopes that the player’s death in a plane crash would act as a catalyst to improve regulations that have fallen short On the sixth anniversary of Emiliano Sala’s death, Cardiff City’s chairman, Mehmet Dalman, hoped he would be able to speak about some good borne from tragedy: how the shocking loss of a player and the pilot of the plane that killed them had served as football’s wake-up call to ensure such a disaster would not happen again. Instead, Dalman is still imploring football’s authorities to learn from Sala’s death and beef up regulation of the sport’s shady transfer industry. So far, Dalman says, nothing of significance has changed. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: New Millwall recruit offers ‘different profile’ to other centre-back options
arts.sum: “Tristan is a very different profile from the centre-backs we’ve got in the building,” said Lions head coach Neil. “He’s probably more of a ball-playing centre-back, whereas I think most of our lads are out-and-out defenders.

arts.ttl: Jake Cooper: Millwall fans can help pull us through difficult period - the players understand their frustrations
arts.sum: We know it is maybe a bit of a difficult period, they are seeing players leaving and people playing in different positions – but, right now, we need them to stick by us. Jake Cooper has talked about the importance of Millwall supporters in helping the club’s players turn around their Championship fortunes.

arts.ttl: Millwall boss assesses Bangura-Williams impact and warns development is not “overnight” thing
arts.sum: Alex Neil has talked about the patience required in developing young players – with the Millwall head coach impressed by Ra’ees Bangura-Williams’ recent first-team involvement. “Physically I don’t think it is a problem for Ra’ees (playing Championship football).

arts.ttl: Alex Neil gives assessment on ex-Sunderland attacker’s Millwall debut in Hull defeat
arts.sum: Alex Neil has given his assessment on Aaron Connolly’s Millwall debut after his late substitute cameo in their 1-0 defeat at home to Hull on Saturday afternoon. “I didn’t think it was an easy game for him to come into, if I’m honest.

arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Millwall vs Cardiff City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Tuesday. The post ‘A turning point’ – Millwall vs Cardiff City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
